name: national_security_newsroom_s_automated_oakline_tru_loy
premise: An internal crisis team convened after contradictory signals hit leadership from operations, legal, and external partners at once. In National Security, the situation tagged internally around national security newsroom automated oakline tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Gideon Dubois
agents.identity: I am Gideon Dubois, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in National Security. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Kaito Sato
agents.identity: I am Kaito Sato, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in National Security. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on loyalty.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on loyalty for immediate traction on truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Gideon Dubois must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Gideon Dubois do?
